title: Cartoon Dog (Cave Dweller)
description: Cartoon Cat's cousin Cartoon Dog is here...
body:
### _**This Mod Requires Geckolib Installed!**_
This Another Cartoon Dweller made by me. It has his own ID. Huge thanks to Kay for creating it. Sounds are quite unique.It only uses Cartoon Dog sounds. Animations are cartoonisth too.Thank you Rupter for helping me with them. The model of Dweller is kinda funny. It's inspired by addon ,,,Trevor Henderson Addon By FunTime_Lefty''. Hands and legs are switched in places. You can find him on surface and caves. If you want to change config of spawning, use /config command. 
 
 

Have Fun!
